2605.22221.title: Can Transformers Learn to Verify During Backtracking Search?
2605.22221.paper_summary: Backtracking search underlies classical constraint solvers, planners, and theorem provers. Recent transformer-based reasoning systems explore search trees over their own intermediate steps. A common training recipe fits an autoregressive next-token loss on offline solver traces. The model's input at each step is a cumulative trace of all prior decisions. The optimal continue-or-backtrack predictor depends only on the current search state, since two trajectories reaching the same state admit the same viable continuations. We show that decoder-only transformers trained on cumulative traces fail this requirement in two ways: the trace can scatter state features across many positions (scattered retrieval), and the predictor can condition on the trajectory rather than the state (history entanglement). We address scattered retrieval with localization, a trace-level fix that rewrites each decision block to expose state features locally. We address history entanglement with Selective State Attention (SSA), a fixed attention mask that enforces state-based decisions structurally without modifying training data, objective, or parameters. We focus on reactive verification, after propagation has exposed a contradiction. We test SSA on 3-SAT, graph coloring, Blocks World, and backtracking parsing. On same-state pairs that differ only in prior history, SSA emits identical decisions while a cumulative-trained causal baseline does not. Our contribution is a diagnostic of transformer behavior on serialized trajectory data, paired with a structural fix. Pretrained language models that search over their own reasoning steps may face the same failure. Our analysis opens up inference-time context clearing as a candidate way to apply the same isolation without retraining.
2605.22221.paper_summary_zh: 回溯搜索是傳統約束求解器、規劃者和定理證明者的基礎。最近的基於Transformer的推理系統探索其自身中間步驟的搜索樹。一個常見的訓練配方是在離線求解器的痕跡上擬合自回歸的下一個標記損失。模型在每一步的輸入是所有先前決策的累積痕跡。最佳的繼續或回溯預測器僅依賴於當前的搜索狀態，因為到達相同狀態的兩條軌跡允許相同的可行延續。我們展示了僅解碼器的Transformer在累積痕跡上訓練時在兩個方面未能滿足這一要求：痕跡可能在許多位置散佈狀態特徵（散佈檢索），而預測器可以基於軌跡而非狀態進行條件（歷史糾纏）。我們通過定位來解決散佈檢索，這是一種痕跡級別的修正，重寫每個決策區塊以局部顯示狀態特徵。我們通過選擇性狀態注意力（SSA）來解決歷史糾纏，這是一種固定的注意力掩碼，結構上強制基於狀態的決策，而不修改訓練數據、目標或參數。我們專注於反應性驗證，在傳播暴露出矛盾之後。我們在3-SAT、圖著色、方塊世界和回溯解析上測試SSA。在僅在先前歷史上有所不同的同狀態對中，SSA發出相同的決策，而累積訓練的因果基準則不然。我們的貢獻是對Transformer在序列化軌跡數據上的行為進行診斷，並配合結構性修正。搜索自身推理步驟的預訓練語言模型可能面臨相同的失敗。我們的分析開啟了推理時上下文清除作為應用相同隔離而不重新訓練的候選方法。
2605.22221.author: Yin Jun Phua et.al.
2605.22221.authors: Yin Jun Phua, Tony Ribeiro, Tuan Nguyen, Katsumi Inoue
